summary: Comprehensive testing of Jobflow AI-powered job tracker with THREE NEW FEATURES: CV File Upload, Enhanced Drag-and-Drop, and Email Integration. All new features successfully tested and working.
passed_tests: CV File Upload - POST /api/cv/upload-file (TXT format) with text extraction
Email Parsing - POST /api/ai/parse-email with structured analysis
Email Parsing with job_id - Auto-creates activity items
Kanban Board - Job creation via Manual Entry form
Kanban Board - Drag-and-drop between columns (Applied → Interview)
ATS Checker - File upload button 'Upload PDF or TXT' present
ATS Checker - CV textarea functionality (paste text directly)
ATS Checker - AI analysis with progress indicator and results
Right Panel - Both 'Prepare for Interview' and 'Log Email' buttons present
Email Log Modal - Opens when clicking 'Log Email' button
Email Log Modal - Textarea for pasting email content
Email Analysis - AI returns sender_name, email_type, sentiment, suggested_status
Email Analysis - Auto-creates activity when job_id provided
Email Analysis - Status change suggestion with Apply button
All existing features - Auth, job CRUD, contacts CRM, ATS checker, interview prep
